ItacPersonItem.Notes: His affiliation to the Dubbiosi academy is in Ruscelli, Del Tempio alla divina signora (1555). Scarce information about Ferlito are in Mongitore, Bibliotheca sicula, vol. I, p. 276. Possibly the same Ferlito that was appointed as new pastor for the Italian Church in London in 1565? (See Wyatt, The Italian encounter with Tudor England (2006).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
